- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
	Created in the new independent workspace.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Confirmed independent project, Spring Boot + MySQL backend, React PC admin frontend, monthly reporting, center-level data permissions, and query/statistics focus.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Created an independent workspace with `backend` and `frontend`, using Spring Boot and Vite React scaffolds.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Added schema design, Flyway seed data from the Excel template, monthly report APIs, dashboard statistics, master data management, permissions overview, and a PC-oriented admin UI.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions were required by the setup information.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Verified backend compilation with Maven Wrapper on JDK 17 and verified frontend production build with Vite.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Created `.vscode/tasks.json` with the `Verify Data Management System` task and validated the same build flow in terminal.

- [ ] Launch the Project
	Pending user confirmation for debug or launch mode.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	Added root `README.md`, created `.gitignore`, updated this file with current project state, and removed template comments.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
